headline: How The Investment Narrative For KeyCorp (KEY) Is Shifting With New Targets And Assumptions
summary: KeyCorp’s fair value estimate in the latest model sits at US$25.03, just above the previous US$24.92 figure, putting a slightly updated marker on what analysts think the stock may be worth. That comes alongside a mixed research backdrop, with one rating upgrade to Neutral at an unchanged US$19 target, and a blend of higher and lower targets across the Street that underline how views on risk and valuation are still being recalibrated. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these...

headline: 3 Bank Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: Banks serve as the backbone of the economy, facilitating lending, deposits, and financial services that keep businesses and consumers moving forward. But concerns about loan losses and tightening regulations have tempered enthusiasm, limiting the banking industry’s gains to 7.5% over the past six months. This return lagged the S&P 500’s 10% climb.
